name: aiforge-mcp
description: AI/ML Engineering Craft MCP: the hands-on plumbing beneath any AI app — Python for AI (numpy/pandas/pytorch, environments), foundation-model integration (inference, structured output, cost/latency, evals, guardrails), Hugging Face & LangChain as code (Transformers, PEFT/LoRA/QLoRA, serving/quantization, LCEL/create_agent, RAG), and LLM/NLP fundamentals (tokenization, embeddings, transformers, fine-tune-vs-RAG-vs-prompt, decoding, classic NLP). explain_topic/build_it/debug/myth_vs_reality plus check_practice → practice_verdict for fast-moving specifics. Owns the CRAFT; defers agent architecture to loop and OpenAI-platform specifics to openai. Runs as an asset under orchestrator-mcp.
